pwr: slim tip (rectangular) · 135–230W|>Ladder: 135W (X1 Extreme / P1 base, T15p, P15v) → 170W (P50/P51/P70/P71, top P1) → 230W (P52 and bigger). USB-C can trickle-charge some of these but can NOT run them at full tilt. 💡 65W-class OEM bricks are $10–20 used; high-watt (135–230W) bricks run higher — roughly $20–35. Still worth OEM.
bat_note: Internal workstation pack (large Wh). Search "P1 battery FRU".|>90Wh-class in many; base-off swap. ⚠ $20–35 "genuine OEM" listings are near-universally FAKE cells in lookalike wrappers. Real aftermarket ~$50–70+, genuine new ~$100+ where still made; a used REAL OEM pull is often best value — check cycle count / wear on arrival.
